transcript_facts:
- [Findings] so , you've come to see me today because you had a right breast lumpectomy last year .
- [Findings] i do my self breast exams religiously now and have n't felt anything since .
- [Findings] so , i have that you were found to have a calcification in your right breast during a mammogram in october 2019 . was that just a normal screening mammogram , or was it done because you felt a lump ?
- [Findings] and then it looks like you had an ultrasound of your right breast on november 3rd , 2019 , which revealed a mass at the two o'clock position , 11 centimeters from the nipple in the retroareolar region .
- [Findings] based on those results , they decided to do an ultrasound-guided core needle biopsy on december 5th , 2019 . pathology results during that biopsy came back as grade two , er positive , pr positive , dcis , or ductal carcinoma in situ .
- [Findings] but you had a lumpectomy on january 20th , 2020 , which removed the eight millimeter tumor and margins were negative .
- [Findings] and your last mammogram was in january 2021 ?
- [Findings] when was your last colonoscopy ? i had one in 2018 and , if i remember correctly , i had one polyp and that was removed and it was n't cancerous .
- [Findings] and the cholesterol is a fairly new diagnosis , but i am working on exercise and cutting back on fatty foods to see if i can get it lower without any medication .
- [Findings] so for your medical history , it's high cholesterol and stage 0 er/pr positive invasive ductal carcinoma of the right breast . any surgeries other than the lumpectomy ?
- [Findings] only change to make is the breast exam . there are no palpable masses , however , there is skin thickening at the medial inferior aspect of the right breast which may be radiation skin changes . in the result section , note that her ecog performance status today is zero . do you have ... did you have radiation after the lumpectomy ?
- [Findings] so your exam looks good , no masses , just some skin changes from that radiation .
- [Findings] as you know , you've had dcis which we'll list in my note as stage zero , er/pr positive , invasive ductal carcinoma of the right breast . your status post-lumpectomy with removal of five lymph nodes that were benign . today's clinical examination shows no evidence of recurrence with the dcis or other malignancy and your mammogram in january , 2021 was also negative for recurrence and malignancy .
- [Findings] in a year , but you should have another mammogram in april of 2022 before you come back to see me .
- [History of Present Illness] she's here to establish care for a history of dcis .
- [History of Present Illness] the report states the mass was point four by two by three centimeters .
- [History of Present Illness] the pathology confirmed dcis . looks like they also removed 5 lymph nodes , which , thankfully , were negative for malignancy .
- [History of Present Illness] one polyp in the sigmoid colon which had a benign tubular adenoma .
- [History of Present Illness] did you have any other pregnancies that were miscarriages or terminations ?
- [History of Present Illness] and now that you're post-menopausal , are you currently or have you ever been on hormone replacement therapy ?
- [History of Present Illness] and on your review systems form , you indicated that you've not had any recent weight loss or gain , headaches , bone pain , urinary symptoms , or blood in the stools . but you did indicate that you have some back pain , joint pain , and high cholesterol .
- [History of Present Illness] they've said , excuse me , the back and knee pain are age-related .
- [History of Present Illness] for medications , i have that you take coq10 , vitamin d , vitamin c , fish oil , and elderberry fruit .
- [History of Present Illness] i did have my tubes tied after my last baby , but that's all .
- [History of Present Illness] my mom had non-hodgkin's lymphoma and my dad had prostate cancer and heart disease , but i think that's it . any family history of breast cancer ? did any of your children have medical issues or siblings with medical problems ?
- [History of Present Illness] no drugs .
- [History of Present Illness] i have that you're allergic to penicillin . any other allergies ? nope , just penicillin .
- [History of Present Illness] we also talked about endocrine therapy , but i decided against that .
- [History of Present Illness] you also had , um , radiation therapy but declined endocrine therapy .
